concerns.text: T011 states JaCoText has NO verified source and must be resolved before proceeding, but T023 schedules JaCoText implementation without confirming T011 resolution. This contradiction makes T023 unexecutable until the blocking gap is resolved.
T048 'Documentation updates in docs/ including quickstart.md' lacks concrete deliverable. What specific documentation? What updates? Verifier cannot confirm completion.
T049 'Code cleanup and refactoring across code/' lacks concrete deliverable. What cleanup? What refactoring? No verification criteria.
T053 'Security hardening for participant data (anonymization, encryption at rest)' lacks concrete deliverable. What files? What encryption implementation? No verification criteria.
T058 'Document all constraints and assumptions in paper-ready format' lacks concrete deliverable. What constraints? What format? No verification criteria.

T009/T010 verify dataset URLs but Constitution Principle VI requires exact version (commit hash/API snapshot) recorded in data/metadata.yaml. Tasks lack explicit version capture before T055 creates metadata.

T021 'Implement randomization with participant ID, condition assignment, seed logging' does not explicitly include pinning random seeds in code/ as required by Constitution Principle I. Logging ≠ pinning.
T056 'Implement checksum verification for all files under data/' does not include task to write checksums to state file artifact_hashes map as required by Constitution Principle III.
T055 'Create metadata.yaml with dataset versions, commit hashes, timestamps' does not include task to update state file updated_at timestamp as required by Constitution Principle V.

FR-011 requires sensitivity analysis reporting coefficient of variation across threshold values, but T042/T043 split this across two tasks without explicit verification of combined output. Implementer cannot confirm FR-011 completion.
T040/T041 implement correction methods but lack verification task for family-wise error rate ≤0.05 as required by SC-004. No way to confirm SC-004 compliance.
T015 'Implement problem loading with ≥95% load rate' lacks explicit verification task to measure/confirm the loading rate metric. How is ≥95% confirmed?
T006 (logging infrastructure) and T021 (randomization logging) have unclear ownership boundaries for FR-012 logging requirements. Implementer cannot determine which task covers which log fields.
T023/T024 implement specific models but plan allows StarCoder fallback for both languages if JaCoText unavailable. Tasks lack conditional fallback logic for model selection.
Spec lists 5 edge cases but only 4 corresponding tasks. Edge case 'LLM model exceeds 6-hour GitHub Actions job time limit' has no implementation task.
